name: Jeremy Thamert
bio: Jeremy leads MH Construction with mission-level discipline, relationship-first leadership, and more than three decades of construction experience. A U.S. Army aviation veteran and seasoned operator, he aligns field execution, client communication, and long-term strategy so every project is delivered with accountability, precision, and trust.
careerHighlights: Leads company-wide mission alignment from client kickoff through final closeout.
Built and scaled multiple businesses with disciplined operational systems.
Guides strategic growth while protecting MH relationship-first standards.
Mentors leaders to strengthen accountability, communication, and execution.
funFact: Jeremy is most energized when aligning people, safety, and execution around one clear mission.
certifications: Leadership Development, Safety Management, Procore Certified Admin
